name: BullMQ
description: BullMQ — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Job Queues & Background Jobs.

seo.title: BullMQ Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete BullMQ analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. BullMQ offers custom pricing.

cons: Limited customization for complex business logic
